title: Add Registration Flow and UPI Payment Screen on Join Now

requirements.text: Create a RegistrationModal component that opens when the 'Join Now' button on any MatchCard is clicked. The modal must collect three fields: 'In-Game Name', 'Player ID', and 'WhatsApp Number'. All fields are required. The modal must follow the existing dark neon-red theme (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon glow on the submit button). A 'Next' or 'Proceed to Payment' button at the bottom submits the form and advances to the payment screen.

quotes: When 'Join Now' is clicked, ask for 'In-Game Name', 'Player ID', and 'WhatsApp Number'

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Join Now' on any match card opens the RegistrationModal as an overlay/dialog.
The modal contains three labeled input fields: 'In-Game Name', 'Player ID', and 'WhatsApp Number'.
All three fields are required; submitting with any empty field shows an inline validation error.
The modal is styled consistently with the dark neon-red theme (dark background, red borders/glows, uppercase gaming typography).
The modal can be closed/dismissed without completing registration.
Submitting valid data advances the user to the payment screen (REQ-8).

requirements.text: After the registration form is submitted, display a UPI Payment screen (as the next step in the same modal flow or a new modal). The screen must prominently show the UPI ID '[Apna UPI ID eithe likho]' with instructions to pay the entry fee via UPI. It must include an 'Upload Screenshot' button that allows the user to select and preview a payment screenshot image from their device. There must be no other payment gateway options (no Razorpay, Stripe, or similar integrations). The screen must follow the existing dark neon-red theme.

quotes: show a payment screen with my UPI ID [Apna UPI ID eithe likho] and an 'Upload Screenshot' button
Remove any other default payment gateways

acceptanceCriteria: After submitting the registration form, the payment screen is displayed showing the UPI ID '[Apna UPI ID eithe likho]'.
The payment screen shows the match entry fee amount clearly.
An 'Upload Screenshot' button is present; clicking it opens a file picker (accepts image files).
After selecting a file, a preview thumbnail of the uploaded screenshot is shown on screen.
No other payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay, etc.) are present on this screen.
A confirmation/submit button is available after uploading the screenshot.
The screen is styled consistently with the dark neon-red gaming theme.

constraints: Do not integrate any third-party payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal, etc.).
The UPI ID displayed must be exactly '[Apna UPI ID eithe likho]' as a placeholder — do not substitute or invent a different value.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The registration and payment flow must not break the existing MatchCard, MatchList, TournamentBanner, or Header components.
nonGoals: Backend storage of registration data or payment screenshots — this is a frontend-only flow for now.
Actual payment verification or UPI transaction processing.
User authentication or login as part of this flow.
Email or WhatsApp confirmation messages after registration.
